message.content:
# Mobile App Voice Room UI Design Analysis

## 1. Color Scheme

**Background Colors:**
- Main background: Dark navy blue (#0F172A or #121826)
- Secondary background (cards): Slightly lighter navy (#1E293B or #1A2234)
- Accent background (chat message): Green (#10B981 or #059669)

**Text Colors:**
- Primary text: White (#FFFFFF)
- Secondary text: Light gray (#9CA3AF)
- Accent text: Yellow/gold (#FCD34D)
- Warning text: Red (#EF4444)

**Accent Colors:**
- Gold/yellow: #FCD34D (for coins/badges)
- Blue: #3B82F6 (for active tabs)
- Green: #10B981 (for chat messages)
- Purple: #8B5CF6 (for premium badges)

## 2. Layout Structure

**Header Section:**
- Top bar with emoji icons (yellow smileys)
- User profile picture in center
- Microphone icons on sides
- Room ID and user count display
- Welcome message banner

**Tab Navigation:**
- Four tabs: "Classic" (active), "Activity", "Member", "Roy"
- Tab bar with blue underline for active state

**Content Area:**
- Grid layout of game cards (2x2 or 2x3)
- Each card contains:
  - Game icon/image
  - Game title
  - Coin value
  - Badge indicators

**Bottom Bar:**
- Input field with currency symbol
- Send button
- Voice controls

## 3. Component Styling

**Cards:**
- Border radius: 12-16px
- Shadow: Subtle drop shadow (0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1))
- Border: 1px solid transparent (or subtle border on inactive cards)
- Background: Slightly lighter than main background

**Badges:**
- "NEW" badge: Red background with white text
- Premium badge: Purple background with white text
- Coin indicator: Yellow/gold circle with white text

**Buttons:**
- Send button: Blue background (#3B82F6) with white text
- Border radius: 8-12px
- Shadow: Slight elevation

## 4. Typography

**Font Sizes:**
- Header text: 14-16px (medium)
- Tab text: 14px (medium)
- Game titles: 12-14px (medium)
- Coin values: 12px (medium)
- Input field text: 14-16px (medium)

**Font Weights:**
- Headers: Medium (500)
- Tab text: Medium (500)
- Game titles: Regular (400)
- Coin values: Medium (500)

## 5. Icons and Badges

**Icons:**
- Emoji icons: Yellow smileys with black outlines
- Microphone icons: White with subtle shadow
- Game icons: Colorful illustrations (balloons, astronaut, stars, etc.)
- Currency symbol: Gold/yellow

**Badges:**
- "NEW" badge: Red circular badge with white text
- Premium badge: Purple circular badge with white text
- Coin indicators: Yellow/gold circles with white text and coin symbol

## Additional Visual Elements

- User profile picture: Circular with subtle border
- Room ID display: Green background with white text
- Welcome message: White text on dark background
- Coin counter: Gold/yellow with white text
- User count: White text with blue background

The design follows a dark theme with high contrast elements, typical of voice/chat applications, with clear visual hierarchy and intuitive navigation. The color scheme creates a premium feel while maintaining readability.
